title: MBA (Digital Marketing)
content: The two-year MBA in Digital Marketing at the School of Business, Galgotias University, addresses the growing need for digital marketing professionals in various industries. This program integrates traditional marketing management principles with cutting-edge digital marketing technologies and trends. This program is designed to address the strategic dimensions of Digital Marketing in business. The program equips graduates to lead digital marketing initiatives within organizations. The program includes specialized courses on Digital Consumer Behaviour, Search Engine Optimization, Search Engine Advertising, Content Marketing System, Digital metrics and KPIs, Digital Analytics, and many other software. Bachelor Degree with Minimum 50% aggregate marks Students having MAT / XAT / CMAT / NMAT / GMAT/ CUET Score will be given preference in merit Graduates with MBA in Digital Marketing find job opportunities across industries such as ecommerce, technology products, digital platforms, consulting, manufacturing, logistics, KPOs and agencies for digital publishing as well marketing. They can also act as freelance digital marketer and scale up professional services in digital marketing domain. The roles being offered are Chief Digital Marketing Officer (CDMO), Digital Product Manager, Customer Relationship Manager, Brand Manager, Content Strategist, Digital Advertising Specialist, UX/UI Specialist, E-commerce Manager, Category Manager, Digital Marketing Manager, Digital Intrapreneurs by leading organizations such as Google, Microsoft, Amazon, CEAT Tyres, Maruti, Indiamart, KPMG, PWC, Flipkart, DHL, Spotify, Netflix, American Express, Airbnb, OYO, Nike etc. 01 MBA (Digital Marketing) aims to prepare students develop Strategic Digital Marketing Skills, Leverage Advanced Technologies, Foster Innovation through Design Thinking so that they excel into various evolving roles relevant to digital marketing. 01 Apply knowledge of management theories and practices to solve problems. 02 Foster analytical and critical thinking abilities for data-based decision making. 3.Ability to develop Value based Leadership. 03 Ability to develop Value based Leadership. 04 Ability to understand, analyze and communicate global, economic, legal, and ethical aspects of business. 05 Ability to lead themselves and others in the achievement of organizational goals, contributing effectively to a team environment. 06 Ability to conduct investigation of complex problems using modern tools and techniques. 07 Apply the various forms of business communication, supported by effective use of appropriate technology, logical reasoning, articulation of ideas. 08 Apply innovative ideas and knowledge of business project management principles as an entrepreneur/team member/ team leader to develop and manage projects in multidisciplinary environments. 01 Graduate shall grow personally and professionally to be successful in dynamic digital marketing area globally. 02 Graduate shall lead with creative, analytical and entrepreneurial skills to help organizations achieve a competitive advantage using digital marketing. 03 Graduate shall contribute as socially and ethically responsible citizen towards the sustainable development of environment and society at large. 01 Develop and implement digital marketing strategies that align with business goals. 02 Design organizational processes using digital marketing tools. 03 Apply design thinking principles to creatively solve marketing challenges and innovate within the digital marketing space
